content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian took this group of venerable envoys and patrol envoys into that eighth-level personal world.

They need to wipe out all those bone transformation realms at the top of the Blood Fangs, completely occupy this world, and then find the source stone on the other side.

Of course, he was not the only Gu Heng Mountain Venerable Lord who entered here, other Venerable Lords also entered.

Gu Hengshan went all out, and the top of the blood tooth naturally couldn't compete.

At this time.

The Bone Transformation Realm at the top of the Blood Fang knew that something was wrong, and they hid one by one, not daring to fight with the Bone Transformation Realm of Gu Heng Mountain at all.

"There is a bone transformation realm hidden here at the top of the Blood Fang!"

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and slashed it with one blow.

Rumble!!!!

A void collapsed in front of him, and a figure was forced to appear.

"Venerable Lord, it's the Ninth Bone Transformation Realm primordial-level genius at the top of the Blood Tooth - the Lord of Xiushan!"

An envoy reminded.

The primordial-level genius of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm is indeed very powerful.

But Ye Tian was not afraid at all.

This Lord of Xiushan didn't want to fight Ye Tian, so he wanted to escape directly.

But Ye Tian naturally wouldn't let him escape.

"The Void on the Other Side!"

This supernatural skill from the other side was unleashed, and this area was immediately blocked and the opponent's strength was suppressed.

At this time, the Lord of Xiushan couldn't break through time and space and leave, and his speed was greatly reduced, so he couldn't escape at all.

The Lord of Xiushan also knew this, so he was not ready to escape.

"Endless Lord, you are really looking for death, you only have seven bone transformation realms, you dare to stop me!"

He's changed his mind now.

He was ready to capture Ye Tian and use Ye Tian to threaten Gu Heng Mountain as a hostage to ensure the safety of his life.

Once the Ice Beast Palace intervened, he had any hope of surviving.

However.

He was soon confused.

I saw that Ye Tian took out the spear, the weapon of the Origin Rule, and used the golden mang on the other side to attack the Lord of Xiushan.

And the Lord of Xiushan also performed the Ancient Technique!

Rumble!!!!!!

Ye Tian and the Lord of Xiushan were both shocked and flew out.

At this time, the impact force was all offset by Ye Tian's golden body on the other side.

Otherwise, the impact would have been enough to hit him hard.

Then, he killed the Lord of Xiushan again, and the golden body on the other side completely burst out.

This moment.

The Lord of Xiushan was really dumbfounded.

"The golden body on the other side is full!"

"And have a Origin Rule weapon!"

He knew very well that Ye Tian was able to exert the power of the Origin Rule weapon, and he must have comprehended the Origin Rule.

What's even more terrifying is that the whole body has completed the golden body transformation on the other side, and it is even extremely perfect, this is too terrifying!

Except for the Lord of Peace, he hadn't heard of anyone who had achieved the golden embodiment on the other side of the body.

However, he still underestimated Ye Tian.

Ye Tian not only made the golden body of the other side, but also achieved the golden body of the other side with a complete golden body method of the other side, which was extremely perfect and had no flaws at all.

And the golden body of the Lord of Chaos on the other side is still a little flawed.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian and the Lord of Xiushan continued to fight and gradually suppressed the Lord of Xiushan.

The point is that the injuries caused by the magic technique on the other side to the Lord of Xiushan are difficult to recover, while the injuries caused by the Lord of Xiushan to Ye Tian are easy to recover.

After a long time, Ye Tian was not injured, but the Lord of Xiushan was a little unable to bear it.

That's when it happened.

The lord of Xunshan arrived with a group of envoys and inspectors.

Seeing this, the lord of Xiushan showed a look of despair.

"I surrender!"

The Lord of Xiushan hurriedly said.

However.

The lord of Mount Xun said: "The lord of the mountain has given an order, do not accept surrender, kill!"

Immediately.

The Lord of Xunshan also joined the battle and besieged the Lord of Xiushan with Ye Tian.

Soon.

The lord of Xiushan couldn't bear it at all, and his body was pierced again and again.

In the end, the Lord of Xiushan was blown up by Ye Tian's Origin Rule Weapon, and he completely fell and died.

Seeing that the Lord of Xiushan had fallen, they scraped it and found some source stones on the other side.

"Endless Lord, your strength has improved too fast, and now you can even match the Nine Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Geniuses!"

The Lord of Mount Xun exclaimed.

At the beginning, when he first met Ye Tian, Ye Tian was still very weak, and in his eyes he was an ant, although he was a genius, he had not yet shown how demonic he was.

Afterward.

Ye Tian became a genius on the other side, which really shocked him for a long time.

But now, this is no longer something that a genius on the other side can do!

The golden body on the other side of the body was transformed, and he also comprehended the origin rules, although it was an ordinary origin rule, but it was enough to shock him.

With Ye Tian's current strength, even if he is an ordinary genius at the other side, if he is at the same level, he will be killed by Ye Tian in seconds!

Such a peer-level genius has already surpassed the scope of a top-tier genius, and the future potential is too terrifying.

If it becomes the Origin Realm, the future will directly override all the Origin Realms of Gu Heng Mountain.

Thigh!

At this moment, the Lord of Xunshan knew very well that he would have to hold Ye Tian's thigh in the future.

This thigh is even thicker than the thighs of other Gu Heng Mountain deputy mountain masters!

Maybe, whether he can become the Origin Realm in the future will have to rely on Ye Tian.

"Lord of Xunshan, let's continue to search for the bone transformation realm at the top of the Blood Fang!" Ye Tiandao.

The Lord of Xunshan clenched his fists, "Good!"

Immediately, they separated, continuing to search for the bone transformation realm at the top of the Blood Fang.

Gradually, there were fewer and fewer Bloody Fangs Bone Transformation Realms in this world, and they were all killed one by one.

......

Outside the eighth-level personal world.

The Lord of the Blood Fang is still under siege, and he is seriously injured at the moment.

The armor of an Origin Rule weapon on his body was already broken, and the short blade of an injured Origin Rule weapon was also broken.

Not only that, but he was covered in wounds all over his body, and blood was constantly being left.

Suddenly.

Another Origin Realm of Guheng Mountain arrived and joined the siege.

Seeing this, the Lord of the Blood Fangs was extremely desperate in his heart.

He knew very well that even if the Ice Beast Palace arrived, it would take time.

And he was about to run out of power.

"Guys, let me go, I don't want anything!"

The Lord of the Blood Fangs shouted.

However, the Lord of Eternal Zero ignored the Lord of the Blood Fangs and continued to attack.

Puff puff!!!

One by one, the Origin Rule weapons pierced through the flesh of the Lord of the Blood Fangs.

His injuries were getting worse.

In a few moments, he was seriously injured and dying.

Airplanes!

The final blow.

A spear pinned the Lord of the Blood Fang into the void, taking away the last of his life.

So far.

The Lord of the Blood Fangs, the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, had fallen here.

And not long after the fall of the Lord of Blood Fangs, those Origin Realms of the Ice Beast Palace arrived.

Rumble!!!!!

This void on the other side of eternity was directly frozen.

A Venerable Origin Origin Realm Ice Beast arrived here and confronted the Origin Origin Realm Deputy Mountain Masters of Gu Heng Mountain.
